metadata.description: A tracked, human-paced code-change lifecycle for Claude Code built on Jujutsu (jj) workspaces, OpenSpec proposals, and an optional Linear/GitHub issue tracker

plugins.name: change-lifecycle
plugins.description: Take a code change from triage to a reviewable GitHub PR, each change isolated in its own jj workspace and (when it touches specs) governed by an OpenSpec proposal. Skills: triage-change, start-change, make-change, end-change, teardown-change, change-context. Requires the jj-vcs plugin; the Linear MCP is optional (falls back to GitHub Issues via gh).
